author: Dale Kent
description:
The Byzantine Empire, often called the Eastern Roman Empire or simply Byzantium, existed from 330 to 1453 CE. With its capital founded at Constantinople by Constantine I (r. 306-337 CE), the Empire varied in size over the centuries, at one time or another, possessing territories located in Italy, Greece, the Balkans, Levant, Asia Minor, and North Africa. A Christian state with Greek as the official language, the Byzantines developed their own political systems, religious practices, art and architecture, which, although significantly influenced by the Greco-Roman cultural tradition, were distinct and not merely a continuation of ancient Rome. The Byzantine Empire was the longest-lasting medieval power, and its influence continues today, especially in the religion, art, architecture, and law of many Western states, Eastern and Central Europe, and Russia.

Byzantine is lead by Constantine I (Builder-Eloquent), Irene (Schemer-Cunning), and Justinian (Judge-Pious).
Nation Abilities: +1 fatigue limit, [All Cities] +40% culture +25% money.

Dynasties: 
- Constantine: Builder (can build urban, multiple workers can build improvements, [All Cities] -50% build time for workers), Eloquent (Governor +2 civics per culture level).
- Irene & Constantine VI: Schemer (use Legitimacy to buy Orders, 1 Order per turn per war, Scouts are invisible, can Adopt Child, increased adent yields), Cunning (Governor unlock caravans, Leader +20 Foreign & Tribe Leader opinions).
- Justinian & Theodora: Judge (Governor can hurry projects, specialists with money, Leader can switch laws for 100 Civics, can upgrade improvements, can Hold Court), Pious (Governor of State Religion city +2 happy per turn, +5% culture, as Leader +5% state religion spread chance).

Families: Calogera (Clerics), Kantakouzenos (Landowners), Phokas (Champions), Doukas (Traders).
Starting Techs: Ironworking, Administration, Sovereignty.

Unique Units: Comitatenses (Melee-Infantry, 6 Str, can Testudo, -2 iron), Palatini (Melee-Infantry, 8 Str, can Testudo, -2 training -4 iron).
Unique Shrines: Nestoria (+2 civics, +2 culture), Monophysite (+5 culture), Gnosis (+2 culture, +2 science), Paulicia (+2 training, +2 culture).
Unique Religion: Byzantine Paganism.
